content:
You are developing a weekly schedule planner for users to track their tasks. This tool will help users manage their time effectively by displaying tasks that are due with in the next 7 days from a specified current date.

Write a program that allows users to input tasks along with their due dates. The program should display all tasks that are due with in the next 7 days from the specified current date.


---

#### Input

- The first line contains the current date in the format **`YYYY-MM-DD`**.
- The subsequent lines contain tasks in the format Task description, **`YYYY-MM-DD`**. The input ends when an **`end`** line is entered.

---

#### Output


The output should display all tasks due with in the next 7 days from the specified current date in the following format:

```
Tasks due with in the next 7 days:
1. Task description - Due on YYYY-MM-DD
```

If there are no due tasks means print

```
No tasks due with in the next 7 days.
```

---

#### Explanation

If the input is 

```
2025-11-01
Finish project report, 2025-11-15
Buy groceries, 2025-11-10
Doctor appointment, 2025-11-20
end
```

The Expected output is

```
No tasks due with in the next 7 days.
```

---

test_cases.input:
2024-03-10
Prepare presentation, 2024-03-15
Submit tax forms, 2024-03-12
Plan team outing, 2024-03-20
end
test_cases.output:
Tasks due with in the next 7 days:
1. Prepare presentation - Due on 2024-03-15
2. Submit tax forms - Due on 2024-03-12

test_cases.input:
2025-11-01
Finish project report, 2025-11-15
Buy groceries, 2025-11-10
Doctor appointment, 2025-11-20
end
test_cases.output: No tasks due with in the next 7 days.

test_cases.input:
2023-12-25
New Year party planning, 2024-01-01
Grocery shopping, 2023-12-30
Doctor's appointment, 2024-01-02
end
test_cases.output:
Tasks due with in the next 7 days:
1. New Year party planning - Due on 2024-01-01
2. Grocery shopping - Due on 2023-12-30

test_cases.input:
2024-05-01
Submit assignment, 2024-05-05
Team meeting, 2024-05-03
Conference call, 2024-05-10
end
test_cases.output:
Tasks due with in the next 7 days:
1. Submit assignment - Due on 2024-05-05
2. Team meeting - Due on 2024-05-03

test_cases.input:
2023-09-15
Project deadline, 2023-09-20
Budget review meeting, 2023-09-18
Client presentation, 2023-09-25
end
test_cases.output:
Tasks due with in the next 7 days:
1. Project deadline - Due on 2023-09-20
2. Budget review meeting - Due on 2023-09-18
